name: pulse-ops
description: Operational workflows for the Pulse project: SSH status, deploys, logs, Nginx, PM2, tests, and healthchecks.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and deploy the Pulse server safely.
interface.longDescription: Project-specific operational workflows for the Pulse training app, including SSH status checks, GitHub sync, builds, tests, PM2 reloads, Nginx validation, logs, and HTTPS healthchecks.
defaultPrompt: Deploy the latest Pulse main branch to the server.
Show recent Pulse logs and diagnose failures.
